HeroSection.subtitle: "Pleasure in the job puts perfection in the work"
HeroSection.author: Aristotle

LexTrace.name: LexTrace
LexTrace.description: Multi-agent, multimodal contract analysis and semantic diff system.
LexTrace.about: An enterprise-grade AI project demonstrating multi-agent orchestration and testing best practices. Features include OCR text extraction from scanned images with GPT-4o Vision, semantic mapping to mitigate LLM context fatigue, anomaly detection, and structured JSON output validated with Pydantic v2. Fully observable with Langfuse and rigorously tested with pytest-mock achieving 97% logical coverage.

GCP_ecommerce_pipeline.name: GCP E-Commerce Data Intelligence
GCP_ecommerce_pipeline.description: End-to-end data engineering pipeline built on Google Cloud Platform for automated product ingestion, AI-powered categorization, and real-time price monitoring.
GCP_ecommerce_pipeline.about: A serverless, event-driven data pipeline built entirely on GCP. Features include automated batch ingestion with row-level validation, AI-powered product enrichment using Gemini 2.5 Flash via Vertex AI, and real-time price monitoring leveraging Pub/Sub and Cloud Functions Gen2. Infrastructure as Code (IaC) is robustly managed with Terraform using a GCS backend for state management.

TourmasterAI.name: Tourmaster AI
TourmasterAI.description: Production-grade multi-agent orchestration system for music tour management.
TourmasterAI.about: An enterprise-grade multi-agent system built with a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) architecture using LangGraph. Features include specialized AI agents for Booking, Logistics, Marketing, and Weather, integrated with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (ChromaDB) and real-time Tool Calling (OpenWeatherMap). Ensures high-quality outputs via an LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation system and maintains full observability with Langfuse.

Deporturnos.name: Deporturnos
Deporturnos.description: High-performance platform for comprehensive sports center management.
Deporturnos.about:
Comprehensive sports management platform designed for high concurrency and security. 
Key Highlights: 
• Spring Boot architecture with advanced security through JWT. 
• System resilience guaranteed through stress and spike testing with k6. 
• Professional Docker-based infrastructure for agile and consistent deployments.

BiohackerRoot.name: Biohacker Root
BiohackerRoot.description: A high-performance RAG system designed to audit biological 'bugs' and deploy neuroscience-backed protocols.
BiohackerRoot.about: A retrieval-augmented generation system built for personal sovereignty using LangChain, ChromaDB, and OpenAI. Features include Semantic Chunking by logical knowledge units to maintain scientific coherence, advanced Prompt Engineering for strict safety guardrails, conversational memory, and an integrated secondary agent evaluator to score response fidelity and relevance.

DraVildoza.name: Dra. Silvia Vildoza
DraVildoza.description: Premium boutique medical platform with patient management system and professional branding.
DraVildoza.about: A comprehensive trilingual medical system built with Next.js 15 and Supabase. Features an administrative dashboard for HRT lead management, multi-step admission forms with real-time validation, and a high-end UI featuring Glassmorphism aesthetics.

ProductManager.name: Product Manager API
ProductManager.description: Scalable RESTful API designed for advanced product lifecycle management.
ProductManager.about: A backend-focused project demonstrating Clean Architecture and testing best practices. Features include robust CRUD operations, JWT authentication, image handling, and automated testing. Fully documented with Swagger/OpenAPI.

Poui.name: Poui Aromas
Poui.description: E-commerce landing page focused on brand identity and user experience.
Poui.about: A modern, responsive Frontend solution for an aromatherapy business. Features an elegant UI/UX design, an interactive product catalog, and seamless contact integration to drive sales conversion.

AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.d0: I'm a Backend & AI Engineer based in Córdoba, Argentina, focused on building systems that combine robust architectures with real intelligence.
AboutSection.d1: My work centers on multi-agent systems and RAG pipelines — I design, build, and deploy AI-powered backends using Python, LangGraph, and LangChain, integrated with production-grade APIs in Java/Spring Boot.
AboutSection.d2: I'm actively looking for remote opportunities where I can ship backend infrastructure and AI systems that actually work in production — not just demos.

SkillsSection.title: Tech Stack & Tools
SkillsSection.defaultDescription: Hover over a tech to see how I use it!
SkillsSection.Java: Primary language for building robust, enterprise-grade backend systems.
SkillsSection.Docker: Essential for containerization, ensuring consistent environments across development and production.
SkillsSection.SpringBoot: My preferred framework for creating production-ready microservices and APIs.
SkillsSection.PostgreSQL: Go-to relational database for complex data modeling and data integrity.
SkillsSection.MongoDB: Used for flexible, document-oriented data structures when SQL fits less efficiently.
SkillsSection.NextJS: Utilized for server-side rendering (SSR) and building SEO-friendly web applications.
SkillsSection.TypeScript: Ensures type safety and code maintainability across JavaScript projects.
SkillsSection.React: Library of choice for building dynamic, responsive, and modern user interfaces.
